questions.question_translation: 哪种方法用于解决哈希冲突？
questions.explanation: Chaining 链地址法是经典哈希冲突解决方法。

questions.question: What is the time complexity of heap sort?
questions.question_translation: 堆排序的时间复杂度是多少？
questions.explanation: 堆排序最好、最坏、平均复杂度均稳定 O (n log n)。

questions.question: Which data structure is used to model social networks?
questions.question_translation: 哪种数据结构用来建模社交网络？
questions.explanation: 社交网络用户为顶点、好友关系为边，属于图结构。

questions.question: Which sorting algorithm is suitable for small or nearly sorted datasets?
questions.question_translation: 哪种排序算法适合小规模或接近有序的数据？
questions.explanation: 插入排序在数据量小、已有序时效率很高。

questions.question: Which of the following are methods to resolve hash collisions?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪些是解决哈希冲突的方法？
questions.explanation: 开放寻址法、链地址法是两大主流哈希冲突解决方案。

questions.question: Which of the following are true about a forest?
questions.question_translation: 关于森林，说法正确的有？
options: A single tree is a forest
questions.explanation: 森林由互不相交的树组成，树之间无边、无环，单棵树也可看作森林。

questions.question: Which of the following are true about a forest?
questions.question_translation: 关于森林，说法正确的有？
options: Can be converted to a single tree by adding edges
questions.explanation: 森林无环、树不相交，加边可合并为一棵树；不限制必须是二叉树。

questions.question: Which of the following have O(n²) time complexity in the worst case?
questions.question_translation: 最坏时间复杂度为 O (n²) 的有？
options: Quick Sort (worst case) 快速排序
questions.explanation: 快排最坏情况、插入排序都是 O (n²)；堆排序 O (n log n)，二分 O (log n)。

questions.question: Which of the following are disadvantages of insertion sort?
questions.question_translation: 插入排序的缺点有？
questions.explanation: 大数据效率低、时间复杂度高；插入排序是稳定原地排序，无需额外空间。

questions.question: Which of the following data structures are tree-based?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪些是基于树的数据结构？
questions.explanation: 森林、二叉树、堆都属于树形结构；哈希表不是树。

questions.question: Which of the following are true about binary search trees?
questions.question_translation: 关于二叉搜索树正确的有？
questions.explanation: BST 左小右大，查找高效；与排序稳定性无关。

questions.question: Which of the following are characteristics of hash tables?
questions.question_translation: 哈希表的特点有？
questions.explanation: 键值对存储、依赖哈希函数、查找快；不具备稳定排序特性。

questions.question: Which of the following data structures are in-place sorting?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪些属于原地排序？
questions.explanation: 堆排、快排、插入排序都是原地排序；归并排序需要额外空间。

questions.question: Which of the following are tree-based sorting algorithms?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪些是基于树的排序算法？
questions.explanation: 二叉搜索树排序、堆排序都是依托树结构实现。

questions.question: Which of the following are true about binary search?
questions.question_translation: 关于二分查找正确的有？
questions.explanation: 二分查找只能用于有序数组，不能用于链表；最好可一次命中 O (1)，最坏 O (log n)。

questions.question: Which of the following operations can be performed on a hash table?
questions.question_translation: 哈希表可以执行哪些操作？
questions.explanation: 支持插入、删除、查找，不支持高效排序。

questions.question: Which of the following are advantages of insertion sort?
questions.question_translation: 插入排序的优点有？
questions.explanation: 稳定、小数据高效、代码简单；不适合大数据量。

questions.question: Which of the following are true about a max-heap?
questions.question_translation: 关于最大堆正确的有？
questions.explanation: 最大堆是完全二叉树，根为最大值，父大于子；左右孩子无大小限制。

questions.question: Which of the following components are part of a graph?
questions.question_translation: 图的组成部分有？
questions.explanation: 图由顶点（节点）和边组成；Keys 不属于图结构。

questions.question: Which of the following are types of binary trees?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪些属于二叉树的类型？
questions.explanation: 最大堆、最小堆、二叉搜索树都是特殊二叉树；森林是树的集合，不属于二叉树类型。

questions.question: Which of the following are characteristics of binary search?
questions.question_translation: 二分查找的特点有？
questions.explanation: 二分查找核心特点为依赖有序数据、采用分治思想、需要随机访问能力；其时间复杂度为 O (log n)，并非 O(n)。

questions.question: Which of the following data structures require random access?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪些需要随机访问能力？
questions.explanation: 插入排序、基于数组的二分查找依赖随机访问特性实现；链表仅支持顺序访问，哈希表无随机访问需求。

questions.question: What factors affect the performance of a hash table?
questions.question_translation: 影响哈希表性能的因素有？
questions.explanation: 哈希函数的优劣、哈希冲突解决方式、负载因子是影响哈希表查询、插入、删除性能的三大核心因素，节点数量并非核心影响因素。

questions.question: Which of the following are characteristics of a heap?
questions.question_translation: 堆的特点有？
questions.explanation: 堆的核心特征是基于完全二叉树构建，主要分为最大堆和最小堆；堆本身并非有序数组，原地排序是堆排序的特点，而非堆结构的固有特征。

questions.question: Insertion sort is a simple and intuitive sorting algorithm that builds the final sorted array one element at a time by inserting each element into its correct position among the previously sorted elements.
questions.answer: 插入排序是一种简单直观的排序算法，它依次将每个元素插入到前面已排序元素的正确位置，逐步构建出完整的有序数组。

questions.question: 哈希表使用哈希函数将键映射到数组索引，从而实现快速的插入、删除和查找操作。
questions.answer: A hash table uses a hash function to map keys to array indices, thereby enabling fast insertion, deletion, and lookup operations.

title: 数据结构与算法英文测试题库（1–62 题完整版）
filename: 数据结构与算法英文测试题库第八次作业（1–62 题完整版） .docx

questions.question: Which algorithm avoids repeated subproblem calculations?
questions.question_translation: 哪种算法可以避免重复计算子问题？
questions.explanation: 动态规划通过记忆化存储子问题结果，重叠子问题只计算一次；简单递归、暴力枚举、朴素遍历都会重复计算子问题。

questions.question: Which sorting algorithm has the worst time complexity O(n²)?
questions.question_translation: 哪种排序算法的最坏时间复杂度为 O(n²)？
questions.explanation: 冒泡排序最好、平均、最坏时间复杂度均为 O(n²)；归并排序稳定 O(n log n)；快排虽最坏也为 O(n²)，本题考查典型平方级排序，选冒泡。

questions.question: Which sorting algorithm has stable O(n log n) time complexity?
questions.question_translation: 哪种排序算法拥有恒定不变的 O(n log n) 时间复杂度？
questions.explanation: 归并排序最好、平均、最坏均稳定为 O(n log n)；快速排序最坏会退化为 O(n²)；冒泡、选择排序为 O(n²)。

questions.question: Which sorting algorithm is stable and requires extra memory space?
questions.question_translation: 哪种排序算法是稳定排序且需要额外内存空间？
questions.explanation: 归并排序是稳定排序，需要额外辅助数组存放中间结果；冒泡稳定但无需额外空间；快排、堆排序都是不稳定排序。

questions.question: Which of the following cannot be solved by the greedy algorithm to get the optimal solution?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪项问题无法用贪心算法求得最优解？
questions.explanation: 0-1 背包物品不可分割，贪心只能得到近似解，无法全局最优；分数背包、活动选择、特定零钱找零均可用贪心求最优。

questions.question: What strategy does the greedy algorithm adopt in each step?
questions.question_translation: 贪心算法每一步采用什么策略？
questions.explanation: 贪心算法每一步只做局部最优选择，不提前考虑全局，期望最终得到全局最优。

questions.question: Which algorithm does not require recursion in core logic?
questions.question_translation: 哪种算法核心逻辑不需要递归？
questions.explanation: BFS 基于队列迭代实现，无需递归；快排、归并排序、DFS 经典实现都依赖递归。

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a feature of dynamic programming?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪项不是动态规划的特征？
questions.explanation: 动态规划三大特征：重叠子问题、最优子结构、无重复计算；局部最优优先是贪心算法特征。

questions.question: Hash function maps arbitrary-length data to which kind of value?
questions.question_translation: 哈希函数将任意长度数据映射为哪类值？
questions.explanation: 哈希函数核心特性：把任意长度输入，映射为固定长度哈希值。

questions.question: Which sorting algorithm is unstable?
questions.question_translation: 哪种排序算法是不稳定排序？
questions.explanation: 快速排序是不稳定排序；归并、插入、冒泡都属于稳定排序。

questions.question: Which problem is the core idea of dynamic programming?
questions.question_translation: 动态规划的核心思想是？
options: Split overlapping subproblems and store results
option_translations: 拆分重叠子问题并存储结果
questions.explanation: 动态规划核心：拆分重叠子问题、保存子问题解，避免重复暴力计算。

questions.question: Which condition is mandatory for binary search to work correctly?
questions.question_translation: 二分查找能正确运行的必要条件是？
questions.explanation: 二分查找的前提必须是数组有序，无序数组无法使用二分。

questions.question: Dijkstra’s algorithm cannot handle which type of graph?
questions.question_translation: 迪杰斯特拉算法无法处理哪种图？
questions.explanation: Dijkstra 算法不能处理带负权边的图，会造成最短路径判断错误。

questions.question: Which strategy does Quick Sort rely on?
questions.question_translation: 快速排序依托哪种算法思想？
questions.explanation: 快速排序典型采用分治思想：基准划分、递归排序子区间。

questions.question: Which sorting algorithm adopts the divide-and-conquer strategy?
questions.question_translation: 哪种排序算法采用分治策略？
questions.explanation: 归并排序是经典分治排序；插入、选择、冒泡均为简单遍历排序，无分治思想。

questions.question: What problem will occur when two different inputs get the same hash value?
questions.question_translation: 两个不同输入得到相同哈希值，会产生什么问题？
questions.explanation: 不同原始数据映射到同一个哈希值，称为哈希碰撞。

questions.question: Which algorithm is suitable for solving the 0-1 knapsack problem?
questions.question_translation: 适合解决 0-1 背包问题的算法是？
questions.explanation: 0-1 背包标准最优解法是动态规划；贪心无法求最优，BFS、DFS 效率极低不适用。

questions.question: What is the main data structure used in DFS traversal?
questions.question_translation: 深度优先搜索 DFS 主要使用的数据结构是？
questions.explanation: DFS 后进先出，核心依赖栈，递归本质就是调用系统栈。

questions.question: What is the main data structure used in BFS traversal?
questions.question_translation: 广度优先搜索 BFS 主要使用的数据结构是？
questions.explanation: BFS 先进先出，核心依赖队列实现逐层遍历。

questions.question: Which traversal prioritizes going deep first and backtracking later?
questions.question_translation: 哪种遍历优先往深处走、之后回溯？
questions.explanation: DFS 深度优先搜索特点：先深入到底，再回溯遍历其他分支。

questions.question: Dijkstra’s algorithm is designed for which scenario?
questions.question_translation: 迪杰斯特拉算法适用于哪种场景？
questions.explanation: Dijkstra 专门求解非负权图的单源最短路径。

questions.question: Which of the following is a typical application of BFS?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪项是 BFS 的典型应用？
questions.explanation: 无权迷宫最短路径是 BFS 经典应用；最长子序列、背包问题用动态规划。

questions.question: What is the space complexity of recursive DFS?
questions.question_translation: 递归实现 DFS 的空间复杂度是？
questions.explanation: 递归栈深度最坏等于节点总数，空间复杂度为 O(n)。

questions.question: What is the worst time complexity of binary search?
questions.question_translation: 二分查找最坏时间复杂度是？
questions.explanation: 二分查找无论平均、最坏，时间复杂度稳定为 O(log n)。

questions.question: What is the core advantage of binary search?
questions.question_translation: 二分查找的核心优势是？
options: Low time complexity for large data
option_translations: 大数据量下时间复杂度低
questions.explanation: 二分查找对数级时间复杂度，大数据量下效率远高于遍历。

questions.question: What is the average time complexity of hash table lookup?
questions.question_translation: 哈希表查找的平均时间复杂度是？
questions.explanation: 合理处理哈希碰撞后，哈希表查找平均为常数时间 O(1)。

questions.question: Which traversal method is level-order traversal?
questions.question_translation: 哪种遍历方式就是层序遍历？
questions.explanation: BFS 广度优先搜索本质就是树和图的层序遍历。

questions.question: What is the average time complexity of binary search?
questions.question_translation: 二分查找的平均时间复杂度是？
questions.explanation: 二分查找平均时间复杂度稳定为 O(log n)。

questions.question: What is the average time complexity of Quick Sort?
questions.question_translation: 快速排序的平均时间复杂度是？
questions.explanation: 快速排序平均时间复杂度 O(n log n)，最坏退化到 O(n²)。

questions.question: Which algorithm can find the shortest path in an unweighted graph?
questions.question_translation: 哪种算法可以求无权图的最短路径？
questions.explanation: 无权图中 BFS 逐层遍历，天然能求出最短路径；DFS 无法保证最短。

questions.question: Which factors will affect the efficiency of binary search?
questions.question_translation: 哪些因素会影响二分查找的效率？
questions.explanation: 无序数据无法使用二分；数据规模越大二分优势越明显；重复元素、数组随机顺序不影响二分复杂度。

questions.question: Which problems cannot be solved optimally by greedy algorithm?
questions.question_translation: 哪些问题无法用贪心算法得到最优解？
questions.explanation: 复杂多阶段决策、0-1 背包贪心得不到全局最优；活动选择、分数背包可用贪心求最优。

questions.question: Which algorithms have recursive implementation forms?
questions.question_translation: 哪些算法有递归实现形式？
questions.explanation: DFS、快排、归并排序都常用递归实现；BFS 只用队列迭代，一般无递归形式。

questions.question: Which features belong to BFS traversal?
questions.question_translation: 哪些属于 BFS 遍历的特点？
questions.explanation: BFS 逐层扩展、先进先出、适合求无权最短路径；深度优先探索是 DFS 特征。

questions.question: What are the core characteristics of dynamic programming problems?
questions.question_translation: 动态规划问题的核心特征有哪些？
questions.explanation: 动态规划必备两大特征：重叠子问题、最优子结构；A 是贪心、C 不符合 DP。

questions.question: Which statements about Merge Sort are correct?
questions.question_translation: 关于归并排序说法正确的有？
options: Fixed O(n log n) time complexity
option_translations: 固定 O(n log n) 时间复杂度
questions.explanation: 归并排序是分治、稳定排序，时间复杂度固定 O(n log n)；需要额外辅助空间，A 错误。

questions.question: What are the advantages of hash tables?
questions.question_translation: 哈希表的优点有哪些？
questions.explanation: 哈希表平均 O(1)、查询快；不具备高安全性，且一定存在哈希碰撞风险。

questions.question: Which statements about greedy algorithm are correct?
questions.question_translation: 关于贪心算法说法正确的有？
options: May not get global optimal solution
option_translations: 可能得不到全局最优解
questions.explanation: 贪心复杂度低、每步局部最优、不一定全局最优；不适合所有优化问题，D 错误。

questions.question: Which statements about Dijkstra’s algorithm are correct?
questions.question_translation: 关于迪杰斯特拉算法说法正确的有？
questions.explanation: Dijkstra 基于贪心、求解单源最短路径、只适用于非负权图；不能处理负权边，C 错误。

questions.question: Which sorting algorithms are stable?
questions.question_translation: 哪些是稳定排序算法？
questions.explanation: 插入、归并、冒泡都是稳定排序；快速排序是不稳定排序。

questions.question: Which statements about algorithm time complexity are correct?
questions.question_translation: 关于算法时间复杂度说法正确的有？
options: O(log n) is faster than O(n)
O(n log n) is slower than O(log n)
O(n²) is the worst in common sorts
option_translations: O(log n) 比 O(n) 快
O(n log n) 比 O(log n) 慢
O(n²) 是常见排序中最坏的
questions.explanation: 复杂度排序：O(1) < O(log n) < O(n log n) < O(n) < O(n²)，四项表述均正确。

questions.question: Which statements about BFS and DFS are correct?
questions.question_translation: 关于 BFS 和 DFS 说法正确的有？
options: DFS always finds the shortest path
BFS guarantees shortest path in unweighted graph
option_translations: DFS 总能找到最短路径
BFS 在无权图中保证最短路径
questions.explanation: BFS 用队列、DFS 用栈；BFS 在无权图保证最短路径；DFS 不能保证最短路径，C 错误。

questions.question: Which are disadvantages of Quick Sort?
questions.question_translation: 快速排序的缺点有哪些？
questions.explanation: 快排缺点：不稳定排序、最坏退化为 O(n²)；大数据依然很快、空间复杂度不高。

questions.question: Which graph problems can be solved by BFS?
questions.question_translation: 哪些图问题可以用 BFS 解决？
questions.explanation: BFS 可做拓扑排序、无权最短路径、连通分量统计；无法处理负权最短路径。

questions.question: Which scenarios are suitable for greedy algorithm?
questions.question_translation: 哪些场景适合用贪心算法？
questions.explanation: 分数背包、活动选择、特殊图最短路径可用贪心；0-1 背包不适合贪心。

questions.question: Which applications belong to hash algorithms?
questions.question_translation: 哪些属于哈希算法的应用？
questions.explanation: 哈希用于数据去重、加密校验、哈希表查询；图遍历是 BFS/DFS，和哈希无关。

questions.question: Which of the following algorithms use divide-and-conquer strategy?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪些算法使用分治策略？
questions.explanation: 快排、二分查找、归并排序都是典型分治；冒泡排序无分治思想。

questions.question: Which problems can be solved by dynamic programming?
questions.question_translation: 哪些问题可以用动态规划求解？
questions.explanation: 0-1背包、分数背包、爬楼梯、最长公共子序列均可用动态规划求解；其中分数背包也可用贪心算法，但动态规划同样能得到最优解。

questions.question: Which of the following belong to graph traversal algorithms?
questions.question_translation: 哪些属于图遍历算法？
questions.explanation: DFS、BFS 是标准图 / 树遍历算法；快速排序是排序算法、二分查找是查找算法。

questions.question: Which sorting algorithms have O(n log n) average time complexity?
questions.question_translation: 哪些排序算法平均时间复杂度为 O(n log n)？
questions.explanation: 堆排序、归并排序、快速排序平均都是 O(n log n)；冒泡排序为 O(n²)。

questions.question: Divide-and-conquer algorithms split problems into independent subproblems.
questions.question_translation: 分治算法将原问题拆分为相互独立的子问题。
questions.explanation: 分治核心思想就是拆解为互不重叠、相互独立的子问题，求解后合并结果。

questions.question: Dynamic programming stores subproblem results to avoid repeated calculation.
questions.question_translation: 动态规划存储子问题结果，以此避免重复计算。
questions.explanation: 动态规划通过记忆化保存已求子问题，重叠子问题只计算一次，减少重复开销。

questions.question: DFS is more suitable for finding the shortest path than BFS.
questions.question_translation: DFS 比 BFS 更适合求最短路径。
questions.explanation: 无权图中 BFS 天然保证最短路径；DFS 只能找到一条路径，无法保证最短。

questions.question: Dijkstra’s algorithm works well with graphs containing negative edges.
questions.question_translation: 迪杰斯特拉算法可以很好处理含负权边的图。
questions.explanation: Dijkstra 算法不支持负权边，负权边会导致最短路径计算错误。

questions.question: Quick Sort’s worst-case time complexity is O(n²).
questions.question_translation: 快速排序最坏时间复杂度为 O(n²)。
questions.explanation: 当数组已有序、划分极度不平衡时，快排复杂度退化到 O (n²)

questions.question: Binary search requires the input array to be sorted.
questions.question_translation: 二分查找要求输入数组必须有序。
questions.explanation: 有序是二分查找的必要前提，无序数组无法使用二分查找。

questions.question: BFS can find the shortest path in any weighted graph.
questions.question_translation: BFS 能在任意带权图中找到最短路径。
questions.explanation: BFS 只适用于无权 / 等权图；任意带权图需用 Dijkstra、Floyd 等算法。

questions.question: Greedy algorithm always obtains the global optimal solution.
questions.question_translation: 贪心算法总能得到全局最优解。
questions.explanation: 贪心只做局部最优选择，不一定能得到全局最优，如 0-1 背包。

questions.question: Merge Sort is a stable sorting algorithm with O(n log n) time complexity.
questions.question_translation: 归并排序是稳定排序算法，时间复杂度为 O (n log n)。
questions.explanation: 归并排序稳定、分治实现，最好 / 平均 / 最坏均固定 O (n log n)。

questions.question: The average time complexity of hash table access is O(1).
questions.question_translation: 哈希表访问的平均时间复杂度是 O (1)。
questions.explanation: 正常处理哈希碰撞后，哈希表查找、插入、删除平均时间复杂度为常数级 O (1)。

questions.question: BFS explores the graph level by level, so the first time a node is visited is via the shortest path in an unweighted graph.
questions.question_translation: 广度优先搜索（BFS）逐层遍历图，因此在无权图中，一个节点第一次被访问时经过的路径就是最短路径。

questions.question: Dynamic programming is an optimization method that solves complex problems by breaking them into overlapping subproblems and storing their optimal solutions.
questions.question_translation: 动态规划是一种优化算法思想，它将复杂问题拆解为重叠子问题，并保存各个子问题的最优解，从而求解原复杂问题。

title: 第九次作业（操作系统）操作系统英语练习题（完整版-可直接复制Word）
filename: 第九次作业（操作系统）操作系统英语练习题（完整版-可直接复制Word）.docx

questions.question: ______ is used to describe jobs waiting for execution.
questions.question_translation: ______ 用于描述等待执行的作业。
questions.explanation: 作业队列专门存放等待调度执行的作业，其余选项均不符合题意。

questions.question: Choosing an operating system is a major ______ for computer installations.
questions.question_translation: 选择操作系统是计算机装机的一项重大______。
questions.explanation: 挑选操作系统是装机时的重要决策，其余单词含义与语境不符。

questions.question: The operating system manages all ______ in a computer system.
questions.question_translation: 操作系统管理计算机系统中的所有______。
questions.explanation: 操作系统的核心工作是管理计算机软硬件资源。

questions.question: The operating system decides the ______ of job execution.
questions.question_translation: 操作系统决定作业执行的______。
questions.explanation: 操作系统负责作业调度，确定作业的执行先后顺序。

questions.question: The word "simultaneously" means ______.
questions.question_translation: 单词“simultaneously”的意思是______。
questions.explanation: simultaneously 的词义为同时地。

questions.question: We can regard an operating system as a ______.
questions.question_translation: 我们可以把操作系统看作一个______。
questions.explanation: 操作系统的本质是对计算机各类资源进行分配与管理。

questions.question: Operating system acts as an interface between computer hardware and ______.
questions.question_translation: 操作系统充当计算机硬件与______之间的接口。
questions.explanation: 操作系统是连接计算机硬件和使用者的人机接口。

questions.question: The main purpose of an OS is to provide an environment for users to ______ programs.
questions.question_translation: 操作系统的主要目的是为用户______程序提供环境。
questions.explanation: 操作系统主要作用是支持用户运行、执行各类应用程序。

questions.question: Memory space is a kind of computer ______.
questions.question_translation: 内存空间是一种计算机______。
questions.explanation: 内存空间属于计算机重要的系统资源。

questions.question: OS allocates resources to ______ according to task needs.
questions.question_translation: 操作系统根据任务需求为______分配资源。
questions.explanation: 操作系统主要为用户和运行中的程序分配系统资源。

questions.question: For special-purpose use, people may ______ an operating system.
questions.question_translation: 为满足专用用途，人们可以______操作系统。
questions.explanation: 面对专用使用场景，人们会专门设计或修改操作系统。

questions.question: The OS will consider many ______ to make a job queue.
questions.question_translation: 操作系统会考虑许多______来创建作业队列。
questions.explanation: 编排作业队列需要综合考量多种调度因素。

questions.question: An operating system is a ______.
questions.question_translation: 操作系统是一种______。
questions.explanation: 操作系统属于系统软件，本质是一套程序。

questions.question: Users must ______ the operating system to finish tasks.
questions.question_translation: 用户必须______操作系统才能完成任务。
questions.explanation: 用户使用计算机完成工作，必须与操作系统进行交互。

questions.question: I/O devices refer to ______ devices.
questions.question_translation: I/O 设备指的是______设备。
questions.explanation: I/O 是输入与输出的英文缩写，即输入输出设备。

questions.question: All modern operating systems support ______.
questions.question_translation: 所有现代操作系统都支持______。
questions.explanation: 多任务处理是现代操作系统的基本特征。

questions.question: Which of the following belongs to computer resource?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪项属于计算机资源？
questions.explanation: CPU时间是计算机核心调度资源，其余选项均不属于系统资源。

questions.question: Many OS concepts are ______ in other applications.
questions.question_translation: 许多操作系统的概念在其他应用中也______。
questions.explanation: 操作系统的原理和理念可以迁移并应用在其他软件中。

questions.question: A job queue stores ______ jobs.
questions.question_translation: 作业队列存放______的作业。
questions.explanation: 作业队列的作用是排队存放等待执行的作业。

questions.question: Modern OS can run several ______ at the same time.
questions.question_translation: 现代操作系统可以同时运行多个______。
questions.explanation: 现代操作系统能够同时并发运行多个进程。

questions.question: The operating system decides the ______ of jobs. (        )
questions.question_translation: 操作系统决定作业的______。
questions.explanation: 操作系统管控作业的处理顺序与执行次序，颜色和形状与作业调度无关。

questions.question: The advantages of operating system include ______. (        )
questions.question_translation: 操作系统的优点包括______。
questions.explanation: 高效管资源、协助运行程序、简化操作都是操作系统的优势，损坏硬件不属于优点。

questions.question: The interface of OS is used to ______. (        )
questions.question_translation: 操作系统的界面用于______。
questions.explanation: 系统界面方便用户操作设备，同时衔接用户与计算机硬件。

questions.question: What does a job queue contain? (        )
questions.question_translation: 作业队列包含什么？
questions.explanation: 作业队列中存放等待执行和待定排队的作业。

questions.question: Which are the characteristics of modern OS? (        )
questions.question_translation: 哪些是现代操作系统的特征？
questions.explanation: 多任务、运行高效是现代操作系统的典型特点。

questions.question: Which words are related to operating system? (        )
questions.question_translation: 哪些词汇与操作系统相关？
questions.explanation: 进程、硬件、接口、作业队列均为操作系统相关专业术语。

questions.question: The functions of an operating system include ______. (        )
questions.question_translation: 操作系统的功能包括______。
questions.explanation: 操作系统具备作业调度、资源分配和资源管理的功能。

questions.question: Modern operating systems have the features of ______. (        )
questions.question_translation: 现代操作系统具有______特性。
questions.explanation: 同时运行进程、支持多任务是现代操作系统的主要特性。

questions.question: Which words belong to computer terminology? (        )
questions.question_translation: 哪些属于计算机专业术语？
questions.explanation: 队列、分配、执行、进程都是计算机常用专业术语。

questions.question: An operating system can allocate resources to ______. (        )
questions.question_translation: 操作系统可以为______分配资源。
questions.explanation: 操作系统为用户和应用程序分配资源，鼠标、键盘属于硬件外设。

questions.question: An operating system is used for ______. (        )
questions.question_translation: 操作系统可用于______。
questions.explanation: 操作系统用于提供运行环境、调度作业、分配资源，并非只用来玩游戏。

questions.question: The operating system considers ______ to create job queue. (        )
questions.question_translation: 操作系统创建作业队列会考虑______。
questions.explanation: 创建作业队列会参考作业大小、优先级以及各类综合因素，作业颜色无参考意义。

questions.question: Which of the following are computer resources? (        )
questions.question_translation: 以下哪些属于计算机资源？
questions.explanation: CPU时间、内存、输入输出设备、文件存储空间都属于计算机资源。

questions.question: Which statements about OS are correct? (        )
questions.question_translation: 关于操作系统说法正确的是？
questions.explanation: 操作系统管理资源、属于程序、是人机接口，它是软件而非硬件。

questions.question: Users can ______ through operating system. (        )
questions.question_translation: 用户可通过操作系统______。
questions.explanation: 用户可借助系统控制硬件、管理文件、运行程序，损坏硬件是错误操作。

questions.question: Which of the following belong to I/O devices? (        )
questions.question_translation: 以下哪些属于I/O输入输出设备？
questions.explanation: 键盘、鼠标、显示器属于输入输出设备，CPU是运算处理器。

questions.question: Users need to interact with OS to ______. (        )
questions.question_translation: 用户需要与操作系统交互来______。
questions.explanation: 用户和系统交互的目的是完成任务、运行程序。

questions.question: Which of the following are storage resources? (        )
questions.question_translation: 以下哪些属于存储资源？
questions.explanation: 文件存储空间和内存空间都属于计算机存储类资源。

questions.question: Special-purpose operating system can be ______. (        )
questions.question_translation: 专用操作系统可以被______。
questions.explanation: 人们可以专门设计和修改适配专用场景的操作系统。

questions.question: People may ______ an OS for special-purpose usage. (        )
questions.question_translation: 人们可为专用用途______操作系统。
questions.explanation: 针对专用使用场景，可设计或修改对应的操作系统。

questions.question: I/O devices include mouse and keyboard. (        )
questions.question_translation: I/O设备包括鼠标和键盘。
questions.explanation: 鼠标和键盘都属于标准的输入输出设备。

questions.question: Operating system is a kind of software program. (        )
questions.question_translation: 操作系统是一种软件程序。
questions.explanation: 操作系统属于系统软件，是一系列程序的集合。

questions.question: Many OS techniques can be used in other applications. (        )
questions.question_translation: 许多操作系统技术可应用在其他软件中。
questions.explanation: 操作系统的诸多技术和原理可以应用到其他各类程序中。

questions.question: CPU time is not a computer resource. (        )
questions.question_translation: CPU时间不属于计算机资源。
questions.explanation: CPU时间是计算机最重要的系统资源之一。

questions.question: We cannot modify any operating system. (        )
questions.question_translation: 我们不能对任何操作系统进行修改。
questions.explanation: 开源系统、专用操作系统都可以根据需求修改定制。

questions.question: People do not need to interact with operating system. (        )
questions.question_translation: 用户不需要与操作系统进行交互。
questions.explanation: 使用计算机开展工作，必须和操作系统进行交互。

questions.question: OS allocates resources for users and programs. (        )
questions.question_translation: 操作系统为用户和程序分配资源。
questions.explanation: 为用户和程序分配资源是操作系统的核心功能。

questions.question: Modern operating systems can run multiple processes simultaneously. (        )
questions.question_translation: 现代操作系统可以同时运行多个进程。
questions.explanation: 多进程并发运行是现代操作系统的基础能力。

questions.question: The OS has no right to change job execution order. (        )
questions.question_translation: 操作系统无权更改作业执行顺序。
questions.explanation: 作业调度就是操作系统调整作业执行的先后顺序。

questions.question: Job queue stores the finished jobs. (        )
questions.question_translation: 作业队列存放已完成的作业。
questions.explanation: 作业队列仅存放等待执行的作业，不存放已完成作业。

questions.question: Translate the following English into Chinese (英译汉): We can view an operating system as a resource allocator that manages computer resources.
questions.question_translation: 英译汉：操作系统作为资源分配器
questions.answer: 我们可以把操作系统看作是管理计算机资源的资源分配器。
questions.explanation: view...as=把...看作, resource allocator=资源分配器。

questions.question: Translate the following Chinese into English (汉译英): 现代操作系统具备多任务处理能力，可以同时运行多个进程。
questions.question_translation: 汉译英：现代操作系统的多任务能力
questions.answer: Modern operating systems have multitasking capabilities and can run multiple processes simultaneously.
questions.explanation: 多任务处理=multitasking, 进程=processes, 同时=simultaneously。

questions.question: What is the passage mainly about? ( )
questions.question_translation: 这篇文章主要讲的是什么？
questions.explanation: 整篇阅读及整套习题的知识点均围绕操作系统展开。

questions.question: What is the main job of an OS? ( )
questions.question_translation: 操作系统的主要工作是什么？
questions.explanation: 操作系统最核心的工作就是管理计算机软硬件资源。

questions.question: Which of the following is not mentioned as a computer resource? ( )
questions.question_translation: 以下哪项不属于计算机资源？
questions.explanation: 纸张不属于计算机电子资源，其余三项都是标准系统资源。

questions.question: Which statement is true about modern OS? ( )
questions.question_translation: 关于现代操作系统说法正确的是？
questions.explanation: 支持多任务是现代操作系统的典型特征。

questions.question: What can people do for special-purpose equipment? ( )
questions.question_translation: 人们可以为专用设备做什么？
questions.explanation: 针对专用设备，人们可以设计或修改适配的操作系统。

title: 计算机专业英语-第十次作业（C语言）完整答案
filename: 计算机专业英语-第十次作业（C语言）完整答案.docx

questions.question: Other functions included in the program are named by ______.
questions.question_translation: 程序中包含的其他函数由______命名。
questions.explanation: C语言中自定义函数、程序内的函数均由程序员自行命名，编译器、解释器、计算机均不负责函数命名。

questions.question: Which tool generates object programs?
questions.question_translation: 哪种工具生成目标程序？
questions.explanation: 编译器（compiler）的核心功能是将C源程序编译生成目标程序，解释器逐行执行不生成目标程序，屏幕、键盘是硬件设备。

questions.question: Which can enhance the basic instructions of C?
questions.question_translation: 什么可以增强C语言的基本指令？
questions.explanation: C语言的库函数提供了大量扩展功能，能够增强基础指令的能力；关键字是语言基础，变量是存储单元，硬件不直接增强指令。

questions.question: After the called function is executed, it will ______ a result to the calling function.
questions.question_translation: 被调用函数执行后，会向调用函数______一个结果。
questions.explanation: C语言中函数执行完成后通过return关键字返回结果给调用方，是固定语法规则。

questions.question: There is a ______ relationship between one C statement and machine instructions.
questions.question_translation: 一条C语句和机器指令之间是______关系。
questions.explanation: 一条C语言语句会被编译成多条机器指令，属于一对多的对应关系。

questions.question: C language can write very ______ source programs.
questions.question_translation: C语言可以编写非常______的源程序。
questions.explanation: C语言的核心特点之一是代码简洁（concise），语法精简、运算符丰富，无需冗余代码。

questions.question: All program activity in C occurs in ______.
questions.question_translation: C语言中所有的程序活动都发生在______中。
questions.explanation: C程序的所有逻辑执行、功能实现都在函数中完成，函数是C程序的核心执行单元。

questions.question: User-defined functions are named by ______.
questions.question_translation: 用户自定义函数由______命名。
questions.explanation: 用户自定义函数的名称由程序员根据需求自主定义，CPU、编译器、系统均不参与命名。

questions.question: What are the building blocks of C language?
questions.question_translation: C语言的构建块是什么？
questions.explanation: 函数是C程序的基本组成单元，是构建整个C程序的核心模块。

questions.question: C programs are highly ______.
questions.question_translation: C程序具有高度的______。
questions.explanation: 可移植性（portable）是C语言的核心优势，程序可以在不同硬件/系统上运行。

questions.question: One C statement is compiled into many ______ instructions.
questions.question_translation: 一条C语句会被编译成许多______指令。
questions.explanation: 编译器将C语句翻译为计算机能直接识别的机器指令（machine instructions）。

questions.question: C relegates most computer-dependent features to ______.
questions.question_translation: C语言将大多数与计算机相关的特性交由______实现。
questions.explanation: C语言把硬件相关、计算机相关的特性封装在库函数中，保证程序可移植性。

questions.question: Compared with other high-level languages, compiled C programs are ______.
questions.question_translation: 与其他高级语言相比，编译后的C程序______。
questions.explanation: C语言编译后直接生成机器码，执行效率远高于其他多数高级语言。

questions.question: Which tool is easier for developing new programs but less efficient?
questions.question_translation: 哪种工具开发新程序更简单，但执行效率更低？
questions.explanation: 解释器逐行解释执行代码，开发调试简单，但执行效率低于编译器。

questions.question: The execution of a C program must start with the ______ function.
questions.question_translation: C程序的执行必须从______函数开始。
questions.explanation: C语言语法规定，所有程序的执行入口都是main()主函数，是强制要求。

questions.question: Which language is closer to hardware?
questions.question_translation: 哪种语言更接近硬件？
questions.explanation: C语言属于中级语言，兼具高级语言的便捷性和低级语言的硬件操作能力，更接近硬件。

questions.question: We can define specific tasks separately by using ______.
questions.question_translation: 我们可以通过使用______单独定义特定的任务。
questions.explanation: 函数可以封装独立的功能逻辑，用于单独定义和实现特定任务。

questions.question: When was C language developed?
questions.question_translation: C语言是何时开发的？
questions.explanation: C语言由贝尔实验室在1972年开发完成，属于20世纪70年代初。

questions.question: ______ are becoming increasingly common in C language.
questions.question_translation: ______在C语言中变得越来越普遍。
questions.explanation: 随着开发需求变化，C语言的解释器使用场景越来越广泛；打印机、鼠标、键盘是硬件，与语言普及无关。

questions.question: Compilers for C are usually ______.
questions.question_translation: C语言的编译器通常是______。
questions.explanation: C语言编译器体积小巧、结构紧凑（compact），资源占用低。

questions.question: Object programs generated by C compilers are ______.
questions.question_translation: C编译器生成的目标程序是______。
questions.explanation: C编译器生成的目标程序代码精简、体积小巧，执行效率高。

questions.question: The main( ) function is ______ in every C program.
questions.question_translation: main()函数在每个C程序中都是______。
questions.explanation: main()函数是C程序的唯一入口，是每个程序必需的核心函数。

questions.question: Extensive library functions can ______ basic instructions.
questions.question_translation: 大量的库函数可以______基本指令。
questions.explanation: 库函数提供了丰富的扩展功能，能够增强C语言的基础指令能力。

questions.question: C has a relatively ______ instruction set.
questions.question_translation: C语言拥有相对______的指令集。
questions.explanation: C语言的核心指令集精简（small），语法简洁，无冗余指令。

questions.question: Computer-dependent features mean features related to ______.
questions.question_translation: 与计算机相关的特性指的是与______相关的特性。
questions.explanation: 计算机相关特性特指硬件（hardware）相关的功能和属性。

questions.question: Machine language is directly understood by the ______.
questions.question_translation: 机器语言能被______直接理解。
questions.explanation: 机器语言是二进制指令，是计算机唯一能直接识别和执行的语言。

questions.question: When a function name appears as a statement, program execution will ______ to that function.
questions.question_translation: 当函数名作为语句出现时，程序执行会______到该函数。
questions.explanation: 调用函数时，程序的执行流程会转移（transfer）到被调用函数中。

questions.question: The portability of C is ______ than other high-level languages.
questions.question_translation: C语言的可移植性比其他高级语言______。
questions.explanation: C语言通过库函数封装硬件特性，可移植性远优于其他高级语言。

questions.question: C has a large number of ______, which makes the code concise.
questions.question_translation: C语言有大量的______，这使得代码简洁。
questions.explanation: C语言丰富的运算符可以简化代码逻辑，让程序更简洁。

questions.question: C language is best described as a ______ language.
questions.question_translation: C语言最准确的描述是一种______语言。
questions.explanation: C语言兼具高级语言和低级语言的特点，标准定义为中级语言。

questions.question: The reasons for concise C code include ______.
questions.question_translation: C语言代码简洁的原因包括______。
questions.explanation: C语言语法简单、运算符丰富是代码简洁的核心原因，硬件、CPU与代码简洁无关。

questions.question: About interpreters, which are true? ( )
questions.question_translation: 关于解释器，哪些描述是正确的？
questions.explanation: 解释器逐行执行，开发调试易用，但执行效率低，速度慢。

questions.question: What are the advantages of C compilers? ( )
questions.question_translation: C编译器的优势有哪些？
questions.explanation: C编译器结构紧凑，生成的目标程序体积小、执行效率高。

questions.question: Which can help improve C basic instructions? ( )
questions.question_translation: 哪些可以帮助提升C语言的基本指令？
questions.explanation: 库函数、运算符、内置函数均可增强基础指令，键盘是硬件无关。

questions.question: Why are C programs highly portable? ( )
questions.question_translation: 为什么C程序具有高可移植性？
questions.explanation: C语言通过库函数封装硬件相关特性，实现高可移植性；代码冗长、无函数均错误。

questions.question: Which statements about C language are correct? ( )
questions.question_translation: 关于C语言的描述哪些是正确的？
questions.explanation: 四个选项均符合C语言的核心特点。

questions.question: Which of the following are computer English terms? ( )
questions.question_translation: 以下哪些是计算机专业英语术语？
questions.explanation: 四个选项均为C语言/计算机领域标准专业术语。

questions.question: Which features belong to C language? ( )
questions.question_translation: 哪些特性属于C语言？
questions.explanation: C语言指令集精简，并非庞大；其余三项均为C语言核心特性。

questions.question: Which language levels are common in programming? ( )
questions.question_translation: 编程中常见的语言级别有哪些？
questions.explanation: 编程语言分为低级、中级、高级，人类语言不属于编程语言级别。

questions.question: About functions in C, which are correct? ( )
questions.question_translation: 关于C语言中的函数，哪些描述正确？
questions.explanation: 函数可以返回结果，B错误；其余三项均符合C语言函数规则。

questions.question: Interpreters have higher efficiency than compilers.
questions.question_translation: 解释器的效率比编译器更高。
questions.explanation: 编译器生成机器码一次性执行，效率远高于逐行执行的解释器。

questions.question: Variables are the building blocks of C language.
questions.question_translation: 变量是C语言的构建块。
questions.explanation: 函数是C语言的构建块，变量是数据存储单元。

questions.question: C language was created in the early 1970s.
questions.question_translation: C语言诞生于20世纪70年代初。
questions.explanation: C语言1972年诞生，属于70年代初。

questions.question: C language has a large number of operators.
questions.question_translation: C语言有大量的运算符。
questions.explanation: 丰富的运算符是C语言的核心特点之一。

questions.question: User-defined functions are named by the computer.
questions.question_translation: 用户自定义函数由计算机命名。
questions.explanation: 用户自定义函数由程序员命名，而非计算机。

questions.question: C is a pure low-level language.
questions.question_translation: C是纯粹的低级语言。
questions.explanation: C是中级语言，并非纯粹的低级语言。

questions.question: Compiled C programs are small and efficient.
questions.question_translation: 编译后的C程序体积小且效率高。
questions.explanation: C编译程序体积小巧、执行效率高。

questions.question: Most computer-dependent features are put into library functions.
questions.question_translation: 大多数计算机相关特性都被放入库函数中。
questions.explanation: C语言通过库函数封装硬件/计算机相关特性。

questions.question: Library functions can enhance basic instructions of C.
questions.question_translation: 库函数可以增强C语言的基本指令。
questions.explanation: 库函数提供扩展功能，增强基础指令能力。

questions.question: C has a very big instruction set.
questions.question_translation: C语言有非常庞大的指令集。
questions.explanation: C语言指令集精简，并非庞大。

questions.question: One C statement corresponds to many machine instructions.
questions.question_translation: 一条C语句对应多条机器指令。
questions.explanation: C语句编译后会生成多条机器指令，一对多关系。

questions.question: Program execution transfers when calling a function.
questions.question_translation: 调用函数时，程序执行流程会转移。
questions.explanation: 调用函数时，程序流程会跳转到被调用函数执行。

questions.question: A C program must begin with the main( ) function.
questions.question_translation: C程序必须从main()函数开始执行。
questions.explanation: main()是C程序的法定入口，必须存在。

questions.question: Interpreters are becoming more common.
questions.question_translation: 解释器变得越来越普遍。
questions.explanation: C语言解释器在开发、调试场景中使用越来越广泛。

questions.question: C programs are not portable at all.
questions.question_translation: C程序完全不可移植。
questions.explanation: C程序具有极高的可移植性。

questions.question: C语言程序具有极高的可移植性，因为它将大多数硬件相关功能交由库函数实现。
questions.answer: C language programs have extremely high portability, because it delegates most hardware-related functions to library functions.
questions.explanation: 专业术语翻译准确：可移植性（portability）、硬件相关功能（hardware-related functions）、库函数（library functions）；句式符合英文语法逻辑。

questions.question: C is characterized by the ability to write very concise source programs, due in part to the large number of operators included within the language.
questions.answer: C语言的特点是能够编写非常简洁的源程序，部分原因在于该语言包含了大量的运算符。
questions.explanation: 准确翻译核心词汇：concise（简洁的）、source programs（源程序）、operators（运算符）；语句通顺符合中文表达习惯。

title: 计算机专业英语第十一次作业（C++&Java语言）答案+翻译+解析
filename: 计算机专业英语第十一次作业（C++&Java语言）答案+翻译+解析.docx

questions.question: The four pillars of object-oriented programming do NOT include .
questions.question_translation: 面向对象编程的四大支柱不包括。
questions.explanation: 面向对象四大核心特性为封装、继承、多态、抽象，编译是程序执行的流程环节，不属于面向对象编程核心特性。

questions.question: C++ is a ______ typed language that checks data types at compile time.
questions.question_translation: C++ 是一种______类型语言，在编译阶段检查数据类型。
questions.explanation: C++ 属于静态类型语言，所有数据类型的校验工作均在编译阶段完成，动态类型语言则在运行阶段进行类型检查。

questions.question: Java checks most potential errors at ______ time.
questions.question_translation: Java 在______阶段检查大部分潜在错误。
questions.explanation: Java 具备严格的编译期错误检查机制，可在编译阶段提前排查语法、类型等大部分潜在错误，减少运行时异常。

questions.question: Which feature makes Java programs easy to read and write?
questions.question_translation: 哪项特性让 Java 程序易于读写？
questions.explanation: Java 摒弃了冗余、复杂的语法设计，语法简洁规范，是其代码易编写、易阅读、易维护的核心原因。

questions.question: C++ is a ______ programming language with high-level and low-level capabilities.
questions.question_translation: C++ 是一种兼具高级与底层能力的______编程语言。
questions.explanation: C++ 是通用型编程语言，兼具高级语言的开发效率和底层语言的硬件操作能力，可适配系统开发、应用开发、嵌入式开发等各类场景。

questions.question: Java is a(n) ______ programming language.
questions.question_translation: Java 是一种______编程语言。
questions.explanation: Java 源码先编译为跨平台的字节码，再由 JVM 逐行解释执行，不属于纯编译型语言，本质为解释型编程语言。

questions.question: C++ can manipulate hardware, which means it has ______ capabilities.
questions.question_translation: C++ 可以操作硬件，说明它具备______能力。
questions.explanation: 直接操作计算机硬件、内存地址是底层编程语言的典型特征，C++ 保留了C语言的底层操作能力。

questions.question: The core component that realizes Java’s cross-platform feature is .
questions.question_translation: 实现 Java 跨平台特性的核心组件是。
questions.explanation: JVM（Java虚拟机）是Java跨平台的核心，不同系统适配对应的JVM，可统一运行Java字节码，实现“一次编写，到处运行”。

questions.question: The word “robust” in Java features means .
questions.question_translation: Java 特性中的单词 “robust” 含义是。
questions.explanation: 在计算机专业领域中，robust 固定译为健壮的、可靠的，指代程序容错性强、运行稳定。

questions.question: ______ allows different objects to respond to the same message in different ways.
questions.question_translation: ______允许不同对象以不同方式响应同一消息。
questions.explanation: 多态的核心定义即为同一个行为、同一个消息，不同子类对象可以做出不同的实现响应，是面向对象核心特性之一。

questions.question: Java uses ______ to realize automatic memory management.
questions.question_translation: Java 使用______实现自动内存管理。
questions.explanation: Java 摒弃了指针手动内存操作，依靠垃圾回收机制（GC）自动识别、回收无用内存，实现全自动内存管理。

questions.question: C++ supports ______ programming, which does not rely on specific data types.
questions.question_translation: C++ 支持______编程，该编程方式不依赖特定数据类型。
questions.explanation: 泛型编程的核心特点是代码逻辑与具体数据类型解耦，一套代码可适配多种数据类型，提升代码通用性。

questions.question: In C++, the default access modifier for a struct member is .
questions.question_translation: 在 C++ 中，结构体成员的默认访问修饰符是。
questions.explanation: C++ 兼容C语言结构体特性，struct 结构体的所有成员默认访问权限为 public（公有），可直接外部访问。

questions.question: ______ hides internal data details and exposes only necessary interfaces.
questions.question_translation: ______隐藏内部数据细节，仅对外暴露必要接口。
questions.explanation: 数据隐藏的核心思想就是屏蔽类的内部数据和核心实现细节，只对外提供安全、必要的访问接口，保障数据安全。

questions.question: Java programs running in web browsers are called .
questions.question_translation: 运行在网页浏览器中的 Java 程序被称为。
questions.explanation: Java Applet（Java小程序）是专门设计用于嵌入网页、在浏览器中运行的Java程序。

questions.question: Java byte-code is , which means it can run on multiple systems.
questions.question_translation: Java 字节码是，意味着它可以在多个系统上运行。
questions.explanation: Java字节码不依赖具体硬件设备和操作系统，具备机器无关、平台无关特性，依托不同平台的JVM即可运行。

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a feature of Java?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪项不属于 Java 的特性？
questions.explanation: Java核心特性包含多线程、动态性、安全性、健壮性等，无需开发者手动进行内存回收，由GC自动完成。

questions.question: Java programs are compiled into .
questions.question_translation: Java 程序会被编译为。
questions.explanation: Java源代码（.java文件）经编译器编译后，生成.class后缀的字节码文件，而非机器码或可执行文件。

questions.question: C++ classes are extensions of the ______ structure.
questions.question_translation: C++ 的类是对______结构体的扩展。
questions.explanation: C++ 基于C语言扩展而来，C++的类是对C语言结构体的全面扩展，新增了封装、继承、成员函数等面向对象特性。

questions.question: Which paradigm is NOT supported by C++?
questions.question_translation: C++ 不支持以下哪种编程范式？
questions.explanation: C++支持面向过程、面向对象、泛型编程等多种范式，但不支持直接的纯机器级编程。

questions.question: The full name of OOP is .
questions.question_translation: OOP 的全称是。
questions.explanation: OOP是 Object-Oriented Programming 的缩写，中文释义为面向对象编程，是主流编程范式之一。

questions.question: Java programs that run independently on the system are called .
questions.question_translation: 可在系统中独立运行的 Java 程序被称为。
questions.explanation: 无需依赖浏览器、可在操作系统中独立启动运行的Java程序，称为Java独立应用程序。

questions.question: Encapsulation in OOP binds ______ together.
questions.question_translation: 面向对象中的封装将______绑定在一起。
questions.explanation: 封装的核心是将类的成员数据（属性）和操作数据的成员方法封装为一个整体，统一管理和调用。

questions.question: Which access modifier allows access from the same class and its subclasses?
questions.question_translation: 哪种访问修饰符允许本类及其子类访问？
questions.explanation: protected（受保护）权限规则：本类内部、同包类、子类均可访问，外部类无法访问。

questions.question: Java’s early error checking happens during ______.
questions.question_translation: Java 的早期错误检查发生在______阶段。
questions.explanation: Java的早期错误检查即编译期检查，在代码编译阶段提前排查语法、类型、格式等错误，规避运行故障。

questions.question: Java provides ______ mechanism to handle runtime errors and improve robustness.
questions.question_translation: Java 提供______机制处理运行时错误，提升健壮性。
questions.explanation: Java的异常处理机制可捕获、处理程序运行过程中出现的各类异常，避免程序直接崩溃，有效提升程序健壮性。

questions.question: The core advantage of OOP is improving code .
questions.question_translation: 面向对象编程的核心优势是提升代码。
questions.explanation: 面向对象通过继承、封装、多态特性，最大程度实现代码复用，减少重复开发，是其核心优势。

questions.question: Platform-independent is also known as .
questions.question_translation: 平台无关性也被称作。
questions.explanation: platform-independent（平台无关）与architecture-neutral（架构中立）为同义术语，均指代不依赖系统硬件架构、可跨平台运行。

questions.question: OOP inheritance can help developers .
questions.question_translation: 面向对象的继承可以帮助开发者。
questions.explanation: 继承允许子类直接复用父类的属性和方法，无需重复编写代码，大幅提升开发效率和代码复用性。

questions.question: In C++, the default access modifier for a class member is .
questions.question_translation: 在 C++ 中，类成员的默认访问修饰符是。
questions.explanation: C++中class类的所有成员默认访问权限为private（私有），仅本类内部可访问，外部和子类均无法直接访问。

questions.question: Which items belong to automatic memory management of Java?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪些属于 Java 的自动内存管理？
questions.explanation: Java自动内存管理包含自动内存分配、主动内存释放、垃圾回收机制，Java无指针概念，不支持手动指针操作。

questions.question: Which programming paradigms does C++ support?
questions.question_translation: C++ 支持哪些编程范式？
questions.explanation: C++是多范式编程语言，支持面向过程、面向对象、泛型编程，不支持纯机器级编程。

questions.question: Which of the following belong to Java’s core features?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪些属于 Java 的核心特性？
questions.explanation: Java四大核心特性为平台无关、多线程、安全性高、健壮性强，此外还具备简洁、动态等特性。

questions.question: Which of the following are dynamic features of Java?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪些是 Java 的动态特性？
questions.explanation: Java的动态特性主要包括运行时类加载、代码动态修改，仅静态编译、固定代码运行不属于动态特性。

questions.question: What are the functions of public members in a class?
questions.question_translation: 类中公有成员的作用是什么？
questions.explanation: public公有成员可被任意外部类访问，主要用于提供对外访问接口、实现代码复用；保护核心逻辑、隐藏内部数据是私有成员的作用。

questions.question: Which of the following explain Java’s simplicity?
questions.question_translation: 以下哪些体现了 Java 的简洁性？
questions.explanation: Java剔除了冗余复杂的语法设计，语法简洁、代码易读写、易维护，复杂语法规则与其简洁性相悖。

questions.question: Inheritance can .
questions.question_translation: 继承可以。
questions.explanation: 继承可复用父类已有功能、简化整体代码结构、基于父类扩展新功能，有效减少代码冗余，而非增加冗余。

questions.question: Which statements about C++ class and struct are correct?
questions.question_translation: 关于 C++ 的类和结构体，说法正确的是？
questions.explanation: C++中class和struct核心功能基本一致，仅默认访问权限不同，struct默认public，class默认private，可通过权限修饰符实现功能等同。

questions.question: What advantages does object-oriented programming bring?
questions.question_translation: 面向对象编程带来了哪些优势？
questions.explanation: 面向对象编程具备模块化、代码复用性高、结构清晰、程序扩展灵活等多重优势，大幅提升项目可维护性。

questions.question: What can encapsulation achieve?
questions.question_translation: 封装可以实现什么效果？
questions.explanation: 封装可实现数据隐藏、代码模块化，限制外部随意修改内部数据，有效提升程序数据安全性和稳定性。

questions.question: Polymorphism allows .
questions.question_translation: 多态可以实现。
questions.explanation: 多态的核心价值是“一个接口，多种实现”，无需重复编写代码，便于程序功能灵活扩展，提升代码扩展性。

questions.question: What are the advantages of OOP compared with procedural programming?
questions.question_translation: 对比面向过程编程，面向对象的优势是？
questions.explanation: 相较于面向过程编程，面向对象编程结构更清晰、代码复用性更高、项目可维护性更强，程序灵活性更高。

questions.question: What are the characteristics of Java byte-code?
questions.question_translation: Java 字节码的特点是什么？
option_translations: 由 Java 源代码编译生成
questions.explanation: Java字节码由源码编译生成，具备机器无关、跨平台特性，无法直接被硬件执行，需依托JVM解释执行。

questions.question: C++ is described as a ______ language.
questions.question_translation: C++ 被称作______语言。
questions.explanation: C++是通用型、静态类型、多范式的编译型编程语言，并非纯解释型语言。

questions.question: Java’s robustness is realized by ______.
questions.question_translation: Java 的健壮性依靠______实现。
questions.explanation: Java通过编译期早期错误检查、运行时异常处理、简洁规范的语法保障程序健壮性，采用自动内存管理，无需手动操作。

questions.question: What are the four pillars of object-oriented development?
questions.question_translation: 面向对象开发的四大支柱是什么？
questions.explanation: 面向对象编程四大核心支柱为封装、继承、多态、数据隐藏（抽象），是OOP的核心基础。

questions.question: Which of the following can Java run?
questions.question_translation: Java 可以运行以下哪些程序？
questions.explanation: Java可开发运行网页小程序、浏览器程序、独立桌面应用，因运行依赖JVM，不适合开发系统内核。

questions.question: Which statements about JVM are correct?
questions.question_translation: 关于 JVM 说法正确的是？
questions.explanation: JVM适配Windows、Linux、Mac等多系统，内置解释器，可运行字节码，是Java实现跨平台的核心。

questions.question: Which features help Java achieve good portability?
questions.question_translation: 哪些特性让 Java 具备良好可移植性？
questions.explanation: Java依托JVM、架构中立特性、字节码机制实现高可移植性，复杂语法会降低程序可移植性。

questions.question: Which access modifiers are supported by C++ classes?
questions.question_translation: C++ 类支持哪些访问修饰符？
questions.explanation: C++类的合法访问修饰符为public、private、protected，global不属于标准访问修饰符。

questions.question: Java needs programmers to manually recycle memory.
questions.question_translation: Java 需要程序员手动回收内存。
questions.explanation: Java通过垃圾回收机制自动完成内存回收，无需开发者手动操作内存，有效避免内存泄漏问题。

questions.question: C++ is both a high-level and low-level programming language.
questions.question_translation: C++ 既是高级语言也是底层语言。
questions.explanation: C++兼具高级语言的高效开发特性，同时保留底层硬件、内存操作能力，是高低层兼具的编程语言。

questions.question: Inheritance and polymorphism are important OOP features.
questions.question_translation: 继承和多态是面向对象编程的重要特性。
questions.explanation: 封装、继承、多态是面向对象编程三大核心特性，是OOP编程思想的核心基础。

questions.question: Encapsulation can realize data hiding in object-oriented programming.
questions.question_translation: 封装可以在面向对象编程中实现数据隐藏。
questions.explanation: 封装通过权限修饰符屏蔽类内部私有数据，仅暴露对外接口，完美实现数据隐藏效果。

questions.question: Java compiler can detect more errors in advance than other languages.
questions.question_translation: Java 编译器相比其他语言能提前检测出更多错误。
questions.explanation: Java拥有严格的编译期语法、类型校验机制，可在编译阶段提前排查大量错误，优于多数动态语言。

questions.question: C++ class and struct have the same default access permission.
questions.question_translation: C++ 中类和结构体的默认访问权限相同。
questions.explanation: C++中class类成员默认权限为private，struct结构体成员默认权限为public，二者默认权限不同。

questions.question: Java can only run web applets and cannot develop independent programs.
questions.question_translation: Java 只能运行网页小程序，无法开发独立程序。
questions.explanation: Java应用场景广泛，既可以开发网页小程序，也可以开发桌面独立应用、后端服务等各类程序。

questions.question: Protected members can be accessed by subclasses.
questions.question_translation: 受保护的成员可以被子类访问。
questions.explanation: protected修饰的成员，允许本类、同包类、子类访问，外部无关类无法访问。

questions.question: Java is a platform-independent programming language.
questions.question_translation: Java 是一门平台无关的编程语言。
questions.explanation: 依托JVM和字节码机制，Java程序可实现跨系统运行，具备典型的平台无关特性。

questions.question: Byte-code is dependent on computer hardware and system.
questions.question_translation: 字节码依赖计算机硬件和系统。
questions.explanation: Java字节码架构中立、机器无关，不依赖任何硬件设备和操作系统，是其跨平台的核心基础。

questions.question: Java is robust because it supports early error checking and runtime exception-handling mechanisms.
questions.question_translation: Java 具备健壮性，因为它支持早期错误检查以及运行时异常处理机制。
questions.answer: 该表述正确。Java 的健壮性体现在双重错误防护机制，一方面在编译阶段完成早期错误检查，提前规避语法、类型等基础错误；另一方面通过完善的异常处理机制，捕获并处理程序运行过程中的各类异常，避免程序崩溃终止，大幅提升了程序运行的稳定性与可靠性。

questions.question: C++ fully supports object-oriented programming, including encapsulation, data hiding, inheritance, and polymorphism.
questions.question_translation: C++ 完全支持面向对象编程，包括封装、数据隐藏、继承和多态。
questions.answer: 该表述正确。C++ 是经典的多范式面向对象编程语言，完整实现了面向对象编程的四大核心特性。通过封装整合数据与方法、实现数据隐藏，依托继承实现代码复用与功能扩展，借助多态实现接口的多样化实现，全面满足面向对象编程的设计思想与开发要求。

questions.question: What is the main advantage of C++ compared with Java?
questions.question_translation: 与Java相比，C++的主要优势是什么？
questions.explanation: C++允许直接操作硬件（direct hardware operation），而Java运行在JVM虚拟机上，不直接操作硬件。C++语法并不比Java简单（排除B），跨平台和自动GC是Java的优势而非C++（排除C、D），故选A。
questions.introduction: C++ vs Java 对比阅读

questions.question: What does Java's "write once, run anywhere" depend on?
questions.question_translation: Java"一次编写，到处运行"依赖什么？
questions.explanation: Java的跨平台特性依赖JVM（Java虚拟机）和字节码（byte-code）。Java源代码编译成字节码后，由各平台的JVM解释执行，从而实现"一次编写，到处运行"（write once, run anywhere）。文本编辑器、操作系统、编译器本身都不能实现跨平台，故选C。

questions.question: Which feature makes Java more robust?
questions.question_translation: 哪个特性使Java更加健壮？
questions.explanation: Java通过严格的错误检查（strict error checking）机制（如编译时类型检查、运行时异常处理）增强了程序的健壮性（robustness）。Java使用自动GC而非手动内存管理（排除A），复杂结构和硬件操作与健壮性无关（排除B、D），故选C。

questions.question: What do C++ and Java have in common?
questions.question_translation: C++和Java有什么共同点？
option_translations: 支持面向对象核心特性
questions.explanation: C++和Java都支持面向对象编程（OOP）的核心特性，包括封装（encapsulation）、继承（inheritance）、多态（polymorphism）。Java是解释型语言且有自动GC，C++是编译型语言且无自动GC（排除B、C）；硬件级操作仅C++支持（排除D），故选A。

questions.question: According to the passage, which statement is TRUE?
questions.question_translation: 根据文章，哪个说法是正确的？
questions.explanation: Java具有自动垃圾回收（automatic garbage collection）是Java的显著特性之一。C++依赖于平台且是编译型语言（排除A、B），Java运行在JVM上无法直接操作硬件（排除C），故选D。

title: 计算机专业英语（面向对象&面向过程）全解｜原文+翻译+选项释义+答案+解析
filename: 计算机专业英语（面向对象&面向过程）第十二次作业全解｜原文+翻译+选项释义+答案+解析.docx

questions.question: Which item is NOT one of the three major characteristics of OOP?
questions.question_translation: 哪一项不属于面向对象编程三大特性？
questions.explanation: OOP三大核心：封装、继承、多态；顺序结构是程序基础控制结构，不属于OOP独有特性。

questions.question: Which programming mode is more suitable for simple, small-scale and fixed-process programs?
questions.question_translation: 哪种编程适合简易、小规模、流程固定的程序？
questions.explanation: 面向过程逻辑直观，开发小型固定流程项目效率更高。

questions.question: What does abstraction in OOP mainly do?
questions.question_translation: 面向对象中抽象的主要作用是什么？
options: Simplify complex real-world things into classes and objects
option_translations: 把现实复杂事物简化抽象为类与对象
questions.explanation: 抽象提炼事物共性，剔除无关细节，映射为程序的类和对象。

questions.question: In OOP, what does an object inherit from a parent class?
questions.question_translation: OOP中子类从父类继承什么内容？
questions.explanation: 子类可同时继承父类的成员属性与成员方法。

questions.question: Which of the following can effectively reduce code redundancy?
questions.question_translation: 哪项能有效减少代码冗余？
questions.explanation: 继承复用已有代码，避免重复编码。

questions.question: Which programming method separates data and business logic completely?
questions.question_translation: 哪种编程将数据与业务逻辑完全分离？
questions.explanation: POP数据、函数相互独立；OOP把数据和方法封装在类内部。

questions.question: What is the core basic unit of Procedural Programming (POP)?
questions.question_translation: 面向过程编程的核心基本单元？
questions.explanation: POP以函数为最小单元，OOP以对象为最小单元。

questions.question: Which of the following is not applicable to procedural programming?
questions.question_translation: 哪项不适合面向过程开发？
questions.explanation: 大型交互软件迭代频繁，面向过程维护成本极高，多用OOP。

questions.question: Which feature makes OOP programs easier to modify and maintain?
questions.question_translation: OOP哪个特性便于程序修改与维护？
questions.explanation: 封装隔离模块，局部修改不影响全局代码。

questions.question: Which programming idea conforms to the real-world object association logic?
questions.question_translation: 哪种编程思想贴合现实事物的关联逻辑？
questions.explanation: OOP依托对象建模，和人类认知现实事物逻辑一致。

questions.question: Polymorphism in OOP is based on which mechanism?
questions.question_translation: 多态依托哪种机制实现？
questions.explanation: 继承是实现多态的必要基础。

questions.question: Which of the following is a unique core feature of object-oriented programming?
questions.question_translation: 哪项是OOP独有的核心特性？
questions.explanation: 顺序、分支、循环是两种编程通用结构，继承仅OOP拥有。

questions.question: Which OOP feature is mainly used to realize code reuse and extend existing functions?
questions.question_translation: 哪个OOP特性用来代码复用、扩展原有功能？
questions.explanation: 子类继承父类代码，新增方法拓展功能。

questions.question: What is the basic operating unit of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)?
questions.question_translation: 面向对象编程基本操作单元？
questions.explanation: 面向对象编程以对象为基本操作单元，所有功能均基于对象实现，函数是面向过程的核心单元。

questions.question: Object-oriented programming focuses on ______.
questions.question_translation: 面向对象侧重于______。
questions.explanation: OOP核心是关注现实事物对应的对象，以及不同对象之间的交互协作，而非执行步骤与逻辑顺序。

questions.question: Which programming paradigm is more in line with human's way of thinking about real things?
questions.question_translation: 哪种范式更贴合人类认识现实事物的思维？
questions.explanation: 人类认知世界以具体事物（对象）为核心，OOP通过类和对象建模现实事物，完全贴合人类思维方式。

questions.question: In traditional procedural programming, what is the relationship between data and functions?
questions.question_translation: 传统面向过程中数据与函数的关系？
questions.explanation: 面向过程编程中，数据是独立变量，函数是独立执行单元，二者相互分离，无绑定关系。

questions.question: What is the core advantage of OOP for large-scale software development?
questions.question_translation: OOP开发大型软件的核心优势？
questions.explanation: OOP依托封装、继承特性实现高模块化，代码耦合度低，便于功能扩展和迭代，是适配大型软件开发的核心优势。

questions.question: In procedural programming, the program is executed in ______ order.
questions.question_translation: 面向过程程序按______顺序执行。
questions.explanation: 面向过程采用自顶向下的设计思路，代码按照编写顺序逐行依次执行。

questions.question: Which programming paradigm focuses on execution steps and logical order to solve problems?
questions.question_translation: 哪种范式聚焦执行步骤、逻辑顺序解决问题？
questions.explanation: 面向过程编程核心思想是关注“怎么做”，严格按照预设执行步骤和逻辑顺序完成问题求解。

questions.question: Polymorphism in OOP allows objects to ______.
questions.question_translation: 多态让对象可以______。
options: Respond to the same message in different ways
option_translations: 以不同方式响应同一消息
questions.explanation: 多态的核心定义即不同子类对象接收同一调用消息时，会执行不同的逻辑、产生不同的响应结果。

questions.question: A subclass in OOP ______ modify the methods inherited from the parent class.
questions.question_translation: OOP中子类______修改继承自父类的方法。
questions.explanation: 子类可以重写父类方法（方法重写），是多态实现方式。

questions.question: What is the essential definition of a class in OOP?
questions.question_translation: OOP中类的本质定义？
questions.explanation: 类是对同类事物的抽象模板，包含统一的属性和方法，可通过类实例化生成多个具体对象。

questions.question: Which of the following belongs to procedural programming language?
questions.question_translation: 哪门是面向过程编程语言？
questions.explanation: C语言是纯面向过程编程语言；Java、Python为纯面向对象语言，C++为面向对象与面向过程混合语言。

questions.question: Procedural programming usually adopts which design idea?
questions.question_translation: 面向过程常用什么设计思路？
questions.explanation: 面向过程采用自顶向下的模块化设计，将整体功能逐层拆解为多个子函数、子流程。

questions.question: Which of the following is purely object-oriented programming language?
questions.question_translation: 纯面向对象编程语言？
questions.explanation: Java是典型的纯面向对象编程语言；C、Pascal、Fortran均为面向过程编程语言。

questions.question: What is the relationship between class and object?
questions.question_translation: 类与对象的关系？
options: Object is the instance of class
Class is the instance of object
Object is the template of class
questions.explanation: 类是抽象模板，对象是根据类创建的具体实例，一个类可对应多个对象。

questions.question: Which of the following is the biggest shortcoming of procedural programming?
questions.question_translation: 面向过程最大缺点？
questions.explanation: 面向过程代码耦合度高，数据与逻辑分离，项目规模变大后，修改、迭代、维护难度极大，这是其核心短板。

questions.question: What is the main purpose of encapsulation in OOP?
questions.question_translation: 封装主要作用？
options: Hide internal data and protect data security
option_translations: 隐藏内部数据、保障数据安全
questions.explanation: 封装将类的私有数据和内部逻辑隐藏，仅对外提供公开访问接口，有效防止数据被随意修改，保障数据安全。

questions.question: Procedural programming focuses on ______.
questions.question_translation: 面向过程关注______。
questions.explanation: 面向过程核心聚焦问题的解决流程和执行步骤，关注“怎么做”；面向对象聚焦问题本身，关注“做什么”。

questions.question: The disadvantages of procedural programming include ______.
questions.question_translation: 面向过程缺点有？
questions.explanation: POP逻辑清晰，A错误。面向过程代码复用性弱、耦合度高，大型项目迭代维护难度大。

questions.question: Which of the following belong to the three core features of OOP?
questions.question_translation: 属于OOP三大特性？
questions.explanation: OOP三大核心特性为封装、继承、多态；顺序执行是基础程序结构，不属于OOP特性。

questions.question: Which of the following are OOP design ideas?
questions.question_translation: OOP设计思想？
questions.explanation: 抽象、模块化、对象交互是OOP核心设计思想；分步执行是面向过程的执行特点。

questions.question: What can abstraction in OOP help developers do?
questions.question_translation: 抽象的作用？
questions.explanation: 抽象的核心是提炼核心特征、剔除琐碎无关细节，从而简化程序设计，不会复杂化逻辑，B错误。

questions.question: The difference between OOP and POP includes ______.
questions.question_translation: OOP与POP区别？
questions.explanation: 二者核心单元、设计思想、代码组织逻辑、适用场景均存在本质区别，四项均正确。

questions.question: What problems will occur if procedural programming is used for large projects?
questions.question_translation: 大型项目使用POP的问题？
questions.explanation: 层级清晰是POP的优点，B错误。大型项目使用POP会出现代码冗余、开发效率低、模块修改维护困难等问题。

questions.question: The manifestations of polymorphism in OOP include ______.
questions.question_translation: 多态表现形式？
options: Multiple methods with the same name and different parameters
Different objects respond differently to the same message
option_translations: 同名不同参的方法重载
同消息不同对象不同响应
questions.explanation: 方法重写、方法重载是多态的核心实现方式，可实现统一调用接口、不同对象差异化响应消息，四项均属于多态表现形式。

questions.question: Which statements about classes and objects are correct?
questions.question_translation: 类和对象描述正确？
options: A class can create multiple objects
option_translations: 一个类可生成多个对象
questions.explanation: 类是抽象通用模板，可实例化生成多个具体对象，对象是类的实际实体，四项描述均符合类与对象的定义。

questions.question: Which statements about polymorphism are correct?
questions.question_translation: 多态描述正确？
questions.explanation: 多态依托继承实现，可统一外部调用接口、提升代码灵活性与兼容性，B错误。

questions.question: Why is OOP suitable for large software development?
questions.question_translation: OOP适配大型项目原因？
questions.explanation: OOP模块化程度高、代码低耦合，便于功能拓展和团队分工协作，完美适配大型软件开发需求。

questions.question: Which languages support object-oriented programming?
questions.question_translation: 支持面向对象的语言？
questions.explanation: 标准C纯面向过程，不支持OOP；C++、Python、Java均支持面向对象编程特性。

questions.question: Which advantages does Object-Oriented Programming have over procedural programming?
questions.question_translation: OOP相对POP优势？
questions.explanation: 相较于面向过程，OOP代码复用性、扩展性、可维护性更优，更适配大型复杂软件项目开发。

questions.question: Which of the following belong to the characteristics of OOP modularity?
questions.question_translation: OOP模块化特点？
questions.explanation: OOP模块化模块相互独立、干扰小，可独立拓展功能，不依赖全局变量，B错误。

questions.question: What are the advantages of procedural programming?
questions.question_translation: 面向过程优点？
questions.explanation: POP扩展性差，C错误。面向过程逻辑简单、易学易用，开发小型简易程序效率较高。

questions.question: What can encapsulation in OOP achieve?
questions.question_translation: 封装实现的效果？
questions.explanation: 封装可隐藏内部私有数据，简化外部调用逻辑，避免外部随意修改数据，大幅提升代码安全性。

questions.question: Which of the following belong to object behaviors in OOP?
questions.question_translation: 属于对象行为？
questions.explanation: 属性是特征，方法/函数是对象行为。

questions.question: What are the characteristics of Procedural Programming?
questions.question_translation: 面向过程特点？
questions.explanation: 强封装是OOP特性，POP无封装特性，D错误。面向过程以流程为核心，自顶向下设计，数据与函数相互分离。

questions.question: Which scenarios are suitable for procedural programming?
questions.question_translation: 适合POP场景？
questions.explanation: 复杂企业系统属于大型复杂项目，适配OOP开发，C错误。固定流程、小型简易程序均适合POP。

questions.question: What are the functions of OOP inheritance?
questions.question_translation: 继承的作用？
questions.explanation: 继承可复用父类代码、精简编码、拓展原有功能，但无法提升程序运行速度，B错误。

questions.question: Which of the following are OOP basic concepts?
questions.question_translation: OOP基础概念？
questions.explanation: 类、对象、属性、方法是面向对象编程最核心的四大基础概念。

questions.question: Inheritance can effectively reduce code redundancy and realize code reuse.
questions.question_translation: 继承可以有效减少代码冗余、实现代码复用。
questions.explanation: 继承复用已有代码，不用重复编写，减少冗余。
questions.section: 三、判断题（A=对，B=错｜原文+翻译+答案+解析）

questions.question: OOP can simulate the operation logic of real-world things well.
questions.question_translation: 面向对象可以很好模拟现实事物运行逻辑。
questions.explanation: OOP以现实事物抽象对象建模，贴合现实逻辑。
questions.section: 三、判断题（A=对，B=错｜原文+翻译+答案+解析）

questions.question: Subclasses can only inherit the attributes of the parent class, not methods.
questions.question_translation: 子类只能继承父类属性，不能继承方法。
questions.explanation: 子类同时继承父类属性+方法。
questions.section: 三、判断题（A=对，B=错｜原文+翻译+答案+解析）

questions.question: Procedural programming is more suitable for large-scale complex software development.
questions.question_translation: 面向过程更适合大型复杂软件开发。
questions.explanation: 大型软件多用OOP，POP后期维护困难。
questions.section: 三、判断题（A=对，B=错｜原文+翻译+答案+解析）

questions.question: A class in OOP is a concrete instance of an object.
questions.question_translation: 类是对象的具体实例。
questions.explanation: 类是模板，对象是类的实例。
questions.section: 三、判断题（A=对，B=错｜原文+翻译+答案+解析）

questions.question: Encapsulation, inheritance and polymorphism are three core features of OOP.
questions.question_translation: 封装、继承、多态是OOP三大核心特性。
questions.explanation: OOP公认三大特征。
questions.section: 三、判断题（A=对，B=错｜原文+翻译+答案+解析）

questions.question: Polymorphism allows different objects to respond differently to the same message.
questions.question_translation: 多态让不同对象对同一消息产生不同响应。
questions.explanation: 多态标准定义。
questions.section: 三、判断题（A=对，B=错｜原文+翻译+答案+解析）

questions.question: The core unit of object-oriented programming is function.
questions.question_translation: 面向对象核心单元是函数。
questions.explanation: OOP核心单元是对象，函数是POP单元。
questions.section: 三、判断题（A=对，B=错｜原文+翻译+答案+解析）

questions.question: Polymorphism operation does not depend on inheritance mechanism.
questions.question_translation: 多态实现不依赖继承机制。
questions.explanation: 继承是实现多态的必要前提。
questions.section: 三、判断题（A=对，B=错｜原文+翻译+答案+解析）

questions.question: Abstraction simplifies complex real problems into program classes and objects.
questions.question_translation: 抽象把现实复杂事物简化成程序中的类和对象。
questions.explanation: 抽象的定义。
questions.section: 三、判断题（A=对，B=错｜原文+翻译+答案+解析）

questions.question: In procedural programming, data and functions are tightly integrated.
questions.question_translation: 面向过程中数据和函数紧密结合。
questions.explanation: POP数据与函数互相分离。
questions.section: 三、判断题（A=对，B=错｜原文+翻译+答案+解析）

questions.question: OOP programs have poorer maintainability than POP programs.
questions.question_translation: OOP程序可维护性比POP差。
questions.explanation: OOP封装模块化，可维护性远优于POP。
questions.section: 三、判断题（A=对，B=错｜原文+翻译+答案+解析）

questions.question: Procedural programming adopts top-down step-by-step design.
questions.question_translation: 面向过程采用自顶向下分步设计。
questions.explanation: 结构化POP经典设计思路。
questions.section: 三、判断题（A=对，B=错｜原文+翻译+答案+解析）

questions.question: Encapsulation can protect internal data from arbitrary external modification.
questions.question_translation: 封装保护内部数据不被外部随意修改。
questions.explanation: 封装隐藏私有成员，限制外部直接访问修改。
questions.section: 三、判断题（A=对，B=错｜原文+翻译+答案+解析）

questions.question: POP has simple logic and low development threshold for small programs.
questions.question_translation: 面向过程逻辑简单，小型程序开发门槛低。
questions.explanation: POP语法直观，小型项目上手快。
questions.section: 三、判断题（A=对，B=错｜原文+翻译+答案+解析）

questions.question: Object-oriented programming is a programming paradigm based on objects, which encapsulates data and operating methods together.
questions.answer: 面向对象编程是以对象为基础的编程范式，将数据和操作方法封装在一起。
questions.section: 四、简答题（原文+中文翻译）

questions.question: Polymorphism means that different objects can produce different response effects when receiving the same message.
questions.answer: 多态是指不同对象收到同一个消息时，能够产生不同的响应效果。
questions.section: 四、简答题（原文+中文翻译）

questions.question: Inheritance enables new classes to obtain existing attributes and methods of parent classes, realizing efficient code reuse.
questions.answer: 继承使新的子类可以获取父类已有的属性和方法，实现高效的代码复用。
questions.section: 四、简答题（原文+中文翻译）

questions.question: Procedural programming focuses on the process of solving problems and divides the whole program into several functional modules.
questions.answer: 面向过程编程聚焦解决问题的流程，把整个程序拆分为若干功能模块。
questions.section: 四、简答题（原文+中文翻译）

questions.question: What is the core driving mode of procedural programming?
questions.question_translation: 面向过程的核心驱动方式？
questions.explanation: 原文明确说明POP（面向过程编程）为过程驱动模式，对应Process-driven。

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT the advantage of procedural programming?
questions.question_translation: 不属于面向过程优势的是？
questions.explanation: 短文中明确提到面向过程编程缺点为扩展性差，因此优秀的扩展性不属于其优势。

questions.question: What does OOP abstract real-world things into?
questions.question_translation: OOP将现实事物抽象为？
questions.explanation: 原文说明OOP是对象驱动，可将现实事物抽象为类和对象，并完成数据与行为的封装。

questions.question: How many core features does OOP have mentioned in the passage?
questions.question_translation: 文中提到OOP几个核心特性？
questions.explanation: 短文明确提及OOP三大核心特性：封装、继承、多态，共计三项。

questions.question: What kind of projects is OOP mainly suitable for?
questions.question_translation: OOP适用项目类型？
questions.explanation: 原文标注OOP是大型复杂软件、企业系统、游戏的主流开发技术，适配大型复杂软件系统开发。
